item.title: FLCN Hadji ecstatic to be back in the international stage in MSC at EWC 2026: "I really miss this feeling."
item.description: Hadji shares his excitement as he returns to the international stage. Here are his thoughts on the MSC at EWC 2026.

item.title: Forget the burrito bowl: Karmine Corp's Blue Rising TCG is the future of esports monetization
item.description: Sick of the boring slapped on logos and lazy sponsored social media posts? Karmine Corp is showing how esports can truly thrive.

item.title: Lich Queen Mei rises in new Overwatch x World of Warcraft collaboration!
item.description: The legendary Lich Queen Mei skin and Frostmourne Ana weapon have entered Overwatch as part of the game's latest World of Warcraft crossover.

item.title: Faker named Youth Cyber Gambling Awareness Ambassador by Korean National Police Agency
item.description: Faker will front a nationwide campaign in South Korea, encouraging young people struggling with cyber gambling to seek help.

item.title: BlizzCon 2026 bundles bring new skins, mounts, and more to your favorite Blizzard games
item.description: Here's everything to know about the BlizzCon Ultimate Collection and new digital bundles! We also go over what to expect at BlizzCon 2026 itself.

item.title: Huanmie talks TFT Space Gods Tactician's Crown: "I still believe I'm one of the most dominant TFT players in the world."
item.description: Huanmie won the TFT Space Gods Tactician's Crown. Here's what he said about his victory plus his advice to players who wish to start their own TFT esports journey.

item.title: MSC 2026 Esports World Cup: Format, schedule, results, and more
item.description: Here is a complete guide to MSC 2026 at the Esports World Cup, including match results, schedules, and key information.

item.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
item.description: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.

item.title: I am not convinced that hunting for AI is going to solve esports' biggest issues
item.description: With Mobile Legends: Bang Bang recently accused of having AI in its menu, I got to thinking: Who cares really? Is it impacting esports?

item.title: Overwatch reveals Shion's original face and Hashimoto elders in new story
item.description: Overwatch's new Shion short story titled "Ambush" revealed Shion's original omnic form plus the names and personalities of the Hashimoto elders.

item.title: MLBB backtracks after fans outrage over AI-generated main menu in advanced server
item.description: Fans are upset about the recent MLBB Advanced Server update that adds a 3D model of Layla that seems to be generated by AI.

item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves has an insane DLC schedule, but it may not be enough to bring the sauce
item.description: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves devs are going ham with the DLC, dropping tons of characters. But do they have the sauce?

item.title: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows yet after PlayTime's scandal at the Esports World Cup
item.description: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

item.title: The FGC has become too serious and we need more people like Hayao
item.description: The FGC has been real serious recently, and we need more whimsy, even if it comes in the form of a shocking tweet from Hayao.

item.title: Is Counter-Strike 2 going soft? Esports fans react to new comms rule and debate hate speech vs. trash talk
item.description: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

item.title: Top Stories Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: EA Head of Esports Monica Dinsmore discusses cross-title operations, mobile growth, sports crossover and future Esports World Cup titles.

item.title: Latest News Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

item.title: Games Archives - Esports Insider
item.description: The Combo Contest is an often overlooked tournament that embodies everything it means to be a Smash player.

item.title: News Archives
item.description: Hadji shares his excitement as he returns to the international stage. Here are his thoughts on the MSC at EWC 2026.

item.title: News Archives
item.description: Team Vitality wins a back-to-back MWI at EWC 2026 championship title after defeating NAVI PH in a six-round series.
